name: Through the Sands of Silence
description: A shattered Farspace ship lies smoldering in the crimson sands of a remote desert planet. Caleb Xia, presumed dead, is critically injured, barely conscious, and unable to call for help. Meanwhile, his partner receives a box of farewell letters, kept hidden until his MIA status was confirmed. Each letter brings them closer to him—and to the choice to risk everything to find the man they refuse to believe is gone.
creator: mistdancersoka
